Document:
# Space Stories - Marine Corps Game Rules
The rules in this section and the in-game guide are primary and take priority over all other sources, including Discord and the Wiki.
## Recent Changes 04.09.2026 - [textlink="Rule 10: Military Law and Mutinies" link="STENGMilitaryLawMutinies"] fixed the text regarding evacuation mutinies.
## Recent Changes 04.05.2026 - [textlink="Rule 2: Role-Playing" link="STENGRolePlay"] and [textlink="Rule 7: Play Your Role" link="STENGPlayYourRole"] have been updated: detailed requirements for portraying different types of survivors have been added. - [textlink="RU (Non-Modifiable Third-Party Provisions)" link="STMarineSOPNONModThirdparty"] has been completely revised.
## Administrative decisions are final. - Rules are applied according to their intent. It is impossible to list every violation example; therefore enforcement depends on administrative interpretation of the rule’s meaning. - Administrators may resolve rule violations using in-game consequences for characters at their discretion. This does not apply to zero-tolerance rules. - You may submit an appeal to head staff if you believe a decision was incorrect.
## General Information Disabling, ignoring, or refusing to answer an admin’s ahelp will result in a ban that is only appealable. This is to prevent players from avoiding consequences. If you need to leave urgently, inform us — this will be taken into account when reviewing an appeal.
All rules below apply at all times, including between rounds.
## Core Rules These are the primary Space Stories - Marine Corps rules. Click on them for detailed information. - [textlink="Rule 0: Community Expectations" link="STENGCommunityExpectations"] - [textlink="Rule 1: Grief" link="STENGGrief"] - [textlink="Rule 2: Roleplay" link="STENGRolePlay"] - [textlink="Rule 3: Metagaming and Metacommunication" link="STENGMetagamingMetacommunication"] - [textlink="Rule 4: ERP" link="STENGERP"] - [textlink="Rule 5: Bug Abuse and Unfair Play" link="STENGBuggingFoulPlay"] - [textlink="Rule 6: Ban Evasion and Multi-Accounts" link="STENGBypassBlockingMultiAccounts"] - [textlink="Rule 7: Play Your Role" link="STENGPlayYourRole"] - [textlink="Rule 8: Character Names" link="STENGCharacterNames"] - [textlink="Rule 9: Use of Lethal Force" link="STENGUseOfLethalForce"] - [textlink="Rule 10: Military Law and Mutinies" link="STENGMilitaryLawMutinies"]
